theme.archetype: Archetype 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast) adapted for Dark Mode Data Analytics

kpi_card.description: Must use 'JetBrains Mono' for the main metric number to give a highly analytical, precise Power-BI feel. No shadows. Use optical alignment for internal elements.

style.description: Lines must be crisp, no area gradients underneath (keep it strictly lines or solid bars) for a Swiss/Tech clean look. Remove chart axis lines; keep only data lines and subtle horizontal grid lines.

list_item.description: Used for Top Selling Items, Inventory, and Expenses. Stack primary text and secondary text on the left, put the metric/value on the far right.

login.layout: Fullscreen ImageBackground with heavy dark gradient overlay.
login.visuals: Use the dark pendant light image for the background.
login.components: Google Sign-In button, sleek input fields with transparent backgrounds and solid bottom borders.

dashboard_home.layout: Scrollable View. Header with Branch Selector. 2x2 Bento grid for KPIs (Today's Sales, Orders, Avg Ticket, Profit). Full width Sales line chart below. Payment mode donut chart half-width paired with Top Selling Items half-width list.

reports.layout: Top Tab navigation (Daily/Monthly/Yearly). Full width stacked bar charts. Metric data tables.

inventory.layout: Search bar sticky top. List of items. Use warning (Yellow) and danger (Red) left-borders on list items to indicate low stock.

expenses.layout: Pie chart top half. Segmented control for category. Floating Action Button (FAB) for 'Add Expense' in primary brand color.

ai_insights.layout: Full width cards. Background subtle tinted gold/amber (rgba(245, 158, 11, 0.05)). Sparkline charts inside cards to show prediction trends.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Text over backgrounds must exceed 4.5:1. Primary white on #0A0A0A is 21:1. Muted text on #141414 must be at least rgba(255,255,255,0.65).
accessibility_and_testing.test_ids: CRITICAL: All Touchables, Inputs, and interactive elements must have a `testID` attribute (React Native equivalent of data-testid). Example: `testID='login-submit-button'`, `testID='kpi-sales-card'`.

images.description: Three pendant lights hanging in darkness. Use with heavy dark gradient overlay (black/70 to black/90) to ensure text legibility.
Modern dining area with hanging pendant lights.
images.usage: Fallback image for empty states or generic placeholders.

icons.instruction: Use Lucide React Native for all iconography. Stroke width 1.5 for a clean, premium tech look. Avoid filled icons.

instructions_to_main_agent: This is a React Native Expo application. DO NOT use HTML/DOM elements (div, span) or web libraries like Shadcn/UI.
Use StyleSheet or NativeWind (if Tailwind is configured) for styling.
Implement the 'Bento Grid' layout using Flexbox (flexWrap: 'wrap', justifyContent: 'space-between') with percentages for width.
Charts must be implemented using react-native-chart-kit or victory-native.

For the login screen, use an ImageBackground with the provided `auth_background` URL and apply a dark overlay (e.g. LinearGradient from rgba(10,10,10,0.7) to rgba(10,10,10,0.95)) so the login form is readable.
All text must use the specified colors. No pure #FFFFFF on pure #000000; use the custom #0A0A0A background and #FFFFFF text.
Ensure all buttons, list items, and form inputs have a `testID` attribute (e.g., `testID='add-expense-button'`) for testing purposes.
Adhere to the 8px border-radius rule for all cards and buttons. DO NOT use heavy drop shadows in dark mode; rely on the 1px subtle border (`rgba(255,255,255,0.08)`) to define edges.
